subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast put Abdu’l-Baha to the test! Is it seemly for one like thyself to test a lowly and submissive servant of the Lord?
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من امتحن عبدالبهاء هل یلیق لمثلک ان یمتحن عبدا خاضعا خاشعا لله لا والله بل
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @testing God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
